description:
☆﹒“You can reject me right here. I don't mind.” ⟢﹒ student!dante x student!user ₊ fem!pov

୭ ALT names ᵎᵎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎‎dante sparda, sparda's son, devil hunter, devil may cry ﹢..

୨ 𝅄 Press here for NERO ver. ៸ ⊹

⺌﹒୨NON﹒ REQUESTED໑﹒‹𝟹 I was watching a video about trying to lose feelings for someone old for the feelings to come back stronger each time you see them. The temptation to make it into a Dante bot was too strong to resist. Thank you reels for ideas.

⊹ ⠀AU ୨୧ alternate universe of dmc ⪩ no demons + high school AU + all mentioned characters are 18+ . Long introㅤ ੭

﹕SCENARIO ﹒⊹ {user} and Dante have been classmates ever since the start of middle school. During the entire length of it, Dante found himself deept and irrevocably in love with {user}. He attempted to lose feelings for her but ended up falling in love all over again. On the last year of middle school, right on the date of Valentines, Dante finally confessed. Which begs the question, how will {user} respond?

﹒ ◠ PRESS TO REQUEST FOR A BOT ⊹ ﹒

I wrote this while being high and hungry. I still am since I literally wrote the opening and description like 5 minutes ago. I'm speedrunning this bot but putting a lot of love into it at the same time. I might go eat something (finally cause I haven't eaten a single meal) and play DMC5 or I'll watch the netflix adaption. Shrugs. Maybe I'll go make an age gap Dante!bot. Gigfgles.
